system.description: Attaching or detaching a weapon from this mount requires a Complex Action. The mount takes light, heavy, or machine pistols and submachine guns; double the cost of the weapon. Player characters can buy external ammo pods that hold 50 rounds, but only one pod can be mounted at any given time. For quadruple the listed price, the mount can be made to retract into a cyberarm that has had a Body enhancement of at least +1.
